updates.title: Launcher v1.0.1
updates.body: The client now always shows as 'Oasis Client' in the Windows taskbar right-click menu.

updates.title: Launcher V1.0.0
updates.body: Initial launcher built, auto-updates launcher and client.

updates.title: Server online
updates.body: Oasis is now running on the live world. Grand Exchange and all bosses are up.
